mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(A1.PRO_ID, '') AS PRO_ID , COALESCE(A1.PRO_GB, '') AS PRO_GB , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TYPE, '') AS PRO_TYPE , CASE WHEN A1.PRO_TYPE = '01' THEN '교육' WHEN A1.PRO_TYPE = '02' THEN '지원사업' WHEN A1.PRO_TYPE = '03' THEN '홍보' ELSE '' END AS PRO_TYPE_NM , COALESCE(A1.REQ_GB, '') AS REQ_GB , COALESCE(A1.PRO_NM, '') AS PRO_NM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TARGET_NM, '') AS PRO_TARGET_NM , COALESCE(A1.ETC_NM, '') AS ETC_NM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_DEPA, '') AS PRO_DEPA , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.PRO_CHARGE), '') AS PRO_CHARGE , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.PRO_TEL), '') AS PRO_TEL , COALESCE(A1.PRO_PART, '') AS PRO_PART , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.PRO_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS PRO_FROM_DD , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.PRO_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS PRO_TO_DD , COALESCE(A1.PRO_ENQUIRY, '') AS PRO_ENQUIRY , COALESCE(A1.PRO_HOW, '') AS PRO_HOW , COALESCE(A1.PRO_SPACE, '') AS PRO_SPACE , COALESCE(A1.PRO_NUM, '') AS PRO_NUM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_COST, '') AS PRO_COST , COALESCE(A1.PRO_PAGE, '') AS PRO_PAGE , COALESCE(A1.PRO_DESIGN, '') AS PRO_DESIGN , COALESCE(A1.EDU_GB, 'N') AS EDU_GB , COALESCE(A1.PRO_TARGET, '') AS PRO_TARGET , COALESCE(A1.BASIC_YN, 'N') AS BASIC_YN , COALESCE(A1.POOR_YN, 'N') AS POOR_YN , COALESCE(A1.SINGLE_YN, 'N') AS SINGLE_YN , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.REC_FROM_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_FROM_DD , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.REC_TO_DD, '%Y%m%d'), '') AS REC_TO_DD , COALESCE(A1.REC_CNT, 0) AS REC_CNT , COALESCE(A1.PRO_SUM, '') AS PRO_SUM , COALESCE(A1.PRO_DESC, '') AS PRO_DESC , COALESCE(A1.PRO_FILE_ID, '') AS PRO_FILE_ID , COALESCE(A1.FILE_ID, '') AS FILE_ID , COALESCE(A1.RUN_STA, '') AS RUN_STA , CASE WHEN A1.RUN_STA = '01' THEN '접수예정' WHEN A1.RUN_STA = '02' THEN '접수중' WHEN A1.RUN_STA = '04' THEN '접수마감' WHEN A1.RUN_STA = '99' THEN '취소' ELSE '' END AS RUN_STA_NM , COALESCE(A1.STTUS_CODE, '') AS STTUS_CODE FROM ARTPROM A1 WHERE A1.PRO_ID = #{proId}
SELECT CONCAT('PRO_', LPAD(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(A1.PRO_ID), 5, 16), 0) + 1, 16, '0')) AS PRO_ID FROM ARTPROM A1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTPROM ( PRO_ID, PRO_GB, PRO_TYPE, REQ_GB, PRO_NM, PRO_TARGET_NM, ETC_NM, EDU_GB, PRO_DEPA, PRO_CHARGE, PRO_TEL, PRO_PART, PRO_FROM_DD, PRO_TO_DD, PRO_ENQUIRY, PRO_HOW, PRO_SPACE, PRO_NUM, PRO_COST, PRO_PAGE, PRO_DESIGN, PRO_TARGET, BASIC_YN, POOR_YN, SINGLE_YN, REC_FROM_DD, REC_TO_DD, REC_CNT, PRO_SUM, PRO_DESC, PRO_FILE_ID, FILE_ID, RUN_STA, STTUS_CODE, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{proId}, #{proGb}, #{proType}, #{reqGb}, #{proNm}, #{proTargetNm}, #{etcNm}, #{eduGb}, #{proDepa}, ENCRYPT(#{proCharge}), ENCRYPT(#{proTel}), #{proPart}, #{proFromDd}, #{proToDd}, #{proEnquiry}, #{proHow}, #{proSpace}, #{proNum}, #{proCost}, #{proPage}, #{proDesign}, #{proTarget}, #{basicYn}, #{poorYn}, #{singleYn}, #{recFromDd}, #{recToDd}, COALESCE(#{recCnt}, 0), #{proSum}, #{proDesc}, #{proFileId}, #{fileId}, #{runSta}, #{sttusCode}, #{UNIQ_ID}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTPROM SET PRO_GB = #{proGb}, PRO_TYPE = #{proType}, REQ_GB = #{reqGb}, PRO_NM = #{proNm}, PRO_TARGET_NM = #{proTargetNm}, ETC_NM = #{etcNm}, PRO_DEPA = #{proDepa}, PRO_CHARGE = ENCRYPT(#{proCharge}), PRO_TEL = ENCRYPT(#{proTel}), PRO_PART = #{proPart}, PRO_FROM_DD = #{proFromDd}, PRO_TO_DD = #{proToDd}, PRO_ENQUIRY = #{proEnquiry}, PRO_HOW = #{proHow}, PRO_SPACE = #{proSpace}, PRO_NUM = #{proNum}, PRO_COST = #{proCost}, PRO_PAGE = #{proPage}, PRO_DESIGN = #{proDesign}, EDU_GB = #{eduGb}, PRO_TARGET = #{proTarget}, BASIC_YN = #{basicYn}, POOR_YN = #{poorYn}, SINGLE_YN = #{singleYn}, REC_FROM_DD = #{recFromDd}, REC_TO_DD = #{recToDd}, REC_CNT = COALESCE(#{recCnt}, 0), PRO_SUM = #{proSum}, PRO_DESC = #{proDesc}, PRO_FILE_ID = #{proFileId}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, RUN_STA = #{runSta}, CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE PRO_ID = #{proId}
UPDATE ARTPROM SET STTUS_CODE = 'D', CHG_USER_ID = #{UNIQ_ID}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE PRO_ID = #{proId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(P.PRO_ID, '') AS PRO_ID, COALESCE(P.PRO_SEQ, 0) AS PRO_SEQ, COALESCE(P.PRO_GB, '') AS PRO_GB, COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR000' AND CODE = P.PRO_GB), '') AS PRO_GB_NM, COALESCE(P.SPACE_ID, '') AS SPACE_ID, COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'EDR004' AND CODE = P.SPACE_ID), '') AS SPACE_ID_NM, DATE_FORMAT(P.WORK_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(P.START_TIME, '%H:%i') AS START_TIME, DATE_FORMAT(P.END_TIME, '%H:%i') AS END_TIME, RPAD(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(P.WEEK_YN, ''), '|', ''), ' ', ''), 1, 7), 7, 'N') AS WEEK_YN, COALESCE(P.REC_CNT, '') AS REC_CNT, COALESCE(A.APPLY_CNT, 0) AS APPLY_CNT, CONCAT(COALESCE(A.APPLY_CNT, 0), '/', COALESCE(P.REC_CNT, 0)) AS APPLY_CNT_STR, COALESCE(P.ITEM1, '') AS ITEM1, COALESCE(P.ITEM2, '') AS ITEM2, COALESCE(P.ITEM3, '') AS ITEM3, COALESCE(P.ITEM4, '') AS ITEM4, COALESCE(P.USE_YN, 'Y') AS USE_YN FROM ARTPROD P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRO_ID, PRO_SEQ, COUNT(*) AS APPLY_CNT FROM ARTAPPM WHERE STTUS_CODE IN ('03','04') AND PRO_ID = #{proId} GROUP BY PRO_ID, PRO_SEQ ) A ON P.PRO_ID = A.PRO_ID AND P.PRO_SEQ = A.PRO_SEQ WHERE P.PRO_ID = #{proId} AND P.STTUS_CODE = 'A' ORDER BY P.PRO_SEQ
